title: Launch Faster: AI Business Plans in 30 Seconds!
hook: Hey entrepreneurs! What if you could get a complete business plan in 30 seconds?

scenes.visual: Energetic entrepreneur looking stressed, then a sudden 'aha!' moment. Quick cut to a futuristic, clean interface appearing on screen.
scenes.voiceover: Hey entrepreneurs! What if you could get a complete business plan in 30 seconds?

scenes.visual: Montage: Frustrated entrepreneur buried in market research papers, staring blankly at a complex spreadsheet, clock ticking rapidly. Overlays of 'OUTDATED DATA' and 'MISSED OPPORTUNITY' warnings.
scenes.text_overlay:
TRADITIONAL RESEARCH IS SLOW & PAINFUL 
 MISSED OPPORTUNITIES!
scenes.voiceover: Stop drowning in endless market research, outdated data, and missed opportunities! Traditional planning takes months, costs thousands, and often leaves you guessing.

scenes.visual: Screen recording: Cursor quickly navigates Feel The Gap. User types a product idea, clicks 'Generate'. A sleek, professional business plan with charts, market size, competitor analysis, and global trade routes instantly populates.
scenes.text_overlay:
INSTANT AI BUSINESS PLANS 
 GLOBAL TRADE INSIGHTS
scenes.voiceover: Introducing Feel The Gap! Our AI generates comprehensive business plans in seconds, leveraging real-time global trade intelligence. Get deep market insights, competitor analysis, and strategy, instantly!

scenes.visual: Dynamic graphic showing a rising bar chart or a '90% TIME SAVED' badge. A confident entrepreneur smiling, reviewing a Feel The Gap report on a tablet.
scenes.voiceover: Entrepreneurs using Feel The Gap launch 70% faster, saving critical time and resources. Stop guessing, start knowing.

scenes.visual: Bold, clean display of 'feelthegap.com' and 'FREE TO START' with the Feel The Gap logo prominently featured.
scenes.voiceover: Ready to revolutionize your business? Visit feelthegap.com – free to start!
